description: MCP server for AI sub-agent delegation across Cursor, Claude, Codex, Gemini, GLM, and Grok
name: io.github.shinpr/sub-agents-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the directory containing agent definition files (.md or .txt)
environmentVariables.name: AGENTS_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Type of AI CLI to use: 'cursor', 'claude', 'gemini', 'codex', 'glm', or 'grok'
environmentVariables.name: AGENT_TYPE

environmentVariables.description: API key for cursor-agent authentication (used only when AGENT_TYPE=cursor; passed via env, never via CLI args)
environmentVariables.name: CURSOR_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Z.ai API token for AGENT_TYPE=glm (passed to the claude binary via env, never via CLI args). Restart/reconnect the MCP server after changing it.
environmentVariables.name: CLI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Maximum execution time for agents in milliseconds (default: 300000, max: 600000)
environmentVariables.name: EXECUTION_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: Enable session management to maintain execution history across agent calls (default: false)
environmentVariables.name: SESSION_ENABLED

environmentVariables.description: Directory path for storing session files (default: .mcp-sessions in current working directory)
environmentVariables.name: SESSION_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Number of days to retain session history before automatic cleanup (default: 7)
environmentVariables.name: SESSION_RETENTION_DAYS

environmentVariables.description: Path to CLI settings file/directory. Claude: --settings arg, Cursor: CURSOR_CONFIG_DIR, Codex: CODEX_HOME. Gemini/Grok not supported.
environmentVariables.name: AGENTS_SETTINGS_PATH
